text: {"acknowledges_specifics":false,"no_unverifiable_promise":false,"states_next_steps":true,"invents_no_policy":true,"consistent_with_gold":false,"within_length":true,"justification":"The reply is generic and doesn’t address bank-withdrawal fee details, promises a follow-up it can’t verify, does state that the team will confirm next, invents no policy, fails to provide the ACH vs wire fee policy required by the gold notes, and is concise."}
